protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: cells were washed ... exposed to CL Buffer ... Igepal CA-630 ... at room temperature; lysates were used for RT-qPCR/Experion analyses

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: CL lysate soluble fraction was obtained by ultracentrifugation or centrifugal filtration and then assessed by Experion electrophoresis

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: Cell lysates were prepared using a non-ionic detergent lysis buffer containing Igepal CA-630 for Western blot analysis

protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
